\tzpentry{ID5932}{Donut Holes Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5932 introduces Donut Holes Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} C_1 = \frac{1}{2\pi} \int_{S^2} \mathcal{F} \end{equation}
